source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race on the TestDDLCallback.OnJobUpdatedExported
source_pr.body:

symptoms: Go race detector: data race on TestDDLCallback.OnJobUpdatedExported hook (concurrent read/write).
failure_signature: Go race detector: data race on TestDDLCallback.OnJobUpdatedExported (concurrent read/write).
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a data race: TestDDLCallback.OnJobUpdatedExported was accessed concurrently without synchronization. This PR stabilizes it by using atomic.Pointer for the hook function and calling it via Load/Store.
fix_pattern: Use atomic.Pointer for TestDDLCallback.OnJobUpdatedExported and access it via Load/Store.

evidence: evidence: ddl: fix data race on the TestDDLCallback.OnJobUpdatedExported
